message:
fix(review-r3): reservation outcome eviction — per-agent fallback cache

Attack: flood the 512-entry reservation event ring buffer with grants
to evict a critical force-release event that sweep needs for resolution.
The outcome is permanently lost and the experience stays unresolved.

Fix: add `reservation_last_outcome: HashMap<String, (Kind, i64)>` that
tracks the most recent non-Granted outcome per agent. The ring buffer
query falls back to this cache when the event has been evicted.

Also derive Copy on ReservationEventKind (all unit variants).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
